name: Sub-App Composition

userStory.iWant: to nest Bijou applications inside each other
userStory.soThat: I can build massive, complex interfaces by composing small, independent, and testable sub-apps.

acceptanceCriteria: A mount() helper allows an App to be placed inside another App's view
Sub-apps maintain their own isolated Model and Msg types
Parent apps can intercept and transform Sub-app messages
The EventBus correctly routes messages to the appropriate sub-app handler
Sub-apps render to their own isolated Surfaces before being blitted by the parent
backwardCompatibility: Legacy 'Single-Model' apps are just the root of a potentially deeper fractal tree. Zero breaking changes for existing apps.

outScope: Shared global state (state should be passed down or managed via Effects)

testPlan.goldenPath: Create a 'Counter' app. Mount two instances of 'Counter' inside a 'Dashboard' app. Verify that clicking '+' on one counter only increments that specific sub-app's model.
edgeCases: Sibling sub-apps sharing the same Msg type (should be namespaced)
Parent app overriding a sub-app's update logic
testPlan.fuzzStress: Mount 100 identical sub-apps and verify that message routing latency remains O(log N).
failureCases: Message 'collisions' where a parent accidentally swallows a sub-app message

estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(D) where D is tree depth
